products.title: Lumière Noir
products.subtitle: Dark, mysterious evening allure
products.description_html:
As dusk falls, Lumière Noir envelops you in an aura of mystery and allure. The deep, resinous scent of sandalwood and oud wraps around you, transporting you to a world of dark, velvety nights and whispered secrets. The flickering flame of this luxurious candle casts shadows on the walls, as the fragrance weaves a spell of seduction and intrigue. Perfect for an evening of quiet contemplation or a sophisticated dinner party, Lumière Noir is the epitome of refined, understated elegance. Let the soft, golden glow and the intoxicating aroma of this exquisite candle transport you to a realm of luxury and refinement.

With its matte-black jar and sleek, minimalist design, Lumière Noir is a stunning addition to any room, its beauty and sophistication evident in every detail. Whether you're seeking to create a dramatic ambiance or simply wish to indulge in a moment of quiet luxury, this exquisite candle is the perfect choice.
bullet_features: Fragrance notes of sandalwood and oud
Perfect for creating a sophisticated ambiance

seo_meta_tags.title: Lumière Noir Soy Candle
seo_meta_tags.description: Luxurious soy candle with sandalwood and oud

products.title: Lumière Blanc
products.subtitle: Fresh, minimal morning serenity
products.description_html:
As the sun rises, Lumière Blanc fills your space with the fresh, uplifting scent of white tea and bergamot. The delicate, citrusy aroma of this exquisite candle is the perfect way to start your day, invigorating your senses and leaving you feeling refreshed and revitalized. The soft, golden light of the candle casts a warm glow, as the fragrance transports you to a world of serenity and tranquility. Perfect for a quiet morning moment or a peaceful afternoon retreat, Lumière Blanc is the epitome of understated elegance and refined sophistication.

With its elegant ivory ceramic jar and gold lid, Lumière Blanc is a beautiful addition to any room, its classic design and sophisticated fragrance evident in every detail. Whether you're seeking to create a peaceful ambiance or simply wish to indulge in a moment of quiet luxury, this exquisite candle is the perfect choice.
bullet_features: 150g candle in an ivory ceramic jar
Fragrance notes of white tea and bergamot
Perfect for creating a fresh, uplifting ambiance

seo_meta_tags.title: Lumière Blanc Soy Candle
seo_meta_tags.description: Luxurious soy candle with white tea and bergamot

products.title: La Nuit Gift Set
products.subtitle: Elegant, alluring gifting experience
products.description_html:
Indulge your loved ones in the luxury of Lumière with our exquisite La Nuit Gift Set. This stunning collection features two 100g candles, each with a unique and alluring fragrance. The Rose Jasmine candle fills the air with the sweet, floral scent of rose and jasmine, while the Cedarwood Vetiver candle transports you to a world of earthy, woody sophistication. Perfect for gifting to friends, family, or that special someone, this beautiful gift set is sure to impress.

Presented in a elegant magnetic velvet gift box, the La Nuit Gift Set is a thoughtful and luxurious way to show you care. The candles are handcrafted with high-quality soy wax and feature unique, complex fragrances that are sure to delight. Whether you're seeking a gift for a special occasion or simply wish to treat someone to a moment of luxury, the La Nuit Gift Set is the perfect choice.
bullet_features: Two 100g candles in a magnetic velvet gift box
Fragrance notes of rose, jasmine, cedarwood, and vetiver
Burn time of approximately 20 hours per candle
Perfect for gifting to friends, family, or loved ones

seo_meta_tags.title: La Nuit Gift Set
seo_meta_tags.description: Luxurious gift set with two soy candles

collection.title: The Signature Collection
collection.description_html: Indulge in the essence of refined luxury with Lumière's The Signature Collection, where handcrafted soy candles weave a tapestry of warmth and elegance. Each carefully curated fragrance is a masterful blend of sophisticated notes, inviting you to surrender to the beauty of the moment. As the soft glow of our candles illuminates your space, let the world slow down, and the beauty of simplicity unfold.
collection.seo_description: Experience refined luxury with Lumière's handcrafted soy candles, expertly blending sophisticated fragrances

about_us.headline: Illuminating Moments, Crafted with Love
about_us.body_html: Lumière's journey began with a passion for creating exquisite, handcrafted soy candles that evoke warmth and sophistication. We craft unique scent profiles to transport you to a world of serenity and elegance.
about_us.founder_note: Creating ambiance, one candle at a time

seo.homepage_title: Lumière — Premium Handcrafted Soy Candles India
seo.homepage_description: Discover Lumière's collection of luxury handcrafted soy candles. Natural, artisan-poured, beautifully packaged. Premium home fragrance for the modern Indian woman.
seo.og_description: Handcrafted soy candles for the modern luxury home. Explore Lumière's Signature Collection.

color_palette.rationale: Deep noir anchors the brand in immediate luxury and creates dramatic contrast with champagne gold. The gold evokes candlelight itself — thematic coherence. Ivory backgrounds give an editorial gallery-white quality. Taupe provides warmth in body copy without competing with the primary text hierarchy.

display.name: Cormorant Garamond
display.use: Hero headlines, product names, section titles, pull quotes
display.rationale: High-contrast thin-thick strokes of refined luxury brands (Hermès, Vogue). The 300 italic at large sizes creates airy luxury. Competes with Aesop and The Row globally.

body.name: Jost
body.use: Navigation, body copy, buttons, captions, price tags
body.rationale: Geometric sans-serif with refined letter-spacing. Clean and modern without coldness. Pairs beautifully with Cormorant by contrast without competition.

accent.name: Italiana
accent.rationale: Italian-influenced serif with dramatic stroke contrast. Reserved for moments of maximum elegance.

typography.pairing_note: The Cormorant/Jost pairing is used by Mejuri, Coterie, and other top luxury DTC brands globally. Cormorant carries heritage and emotion; Jost carries precision and legibility.
